class.name: mdetect_rviz_plugins/GotoPanel
class.description: Command-line style goto panel: type x_mm,y_mm,heading_deg (e.g. 1000,1000,90) and the robot drives there via Nav2 NavigateToPose.

class.name: mdetect_rviz_plugins/TeleopPanel
class.description: Teleop panel with an on/off toggle: while on, hold W/A/S/D (or the on-screen buttons) to stream /cmd_vel_teleop; idle or off gives control back to Nav2 through the cmd_mux.
